title: NPU Draft Device Comparison — T-05 GPU+NPU Heterogeneous Speculative Decoding

tests.name: 14B/GPU + Draft-A/NPU (Qwen3-0.6B 28L INT4, heterogeneous)
tests.failure_detail: VPUX compiler LLVM ABORT during NPU model compilation. Root cause: as_convolution decomposition pass produces degenerate tensor shape (1x0x1x1xf16) for self_attn.v_proj linear layer (Channels count mismatch: 0 != 8). Error: IE.Convolution (tensor<1x0x1x1xf16>, tensor<1x8x1x1xf16>) — model shape incompatible with NPU convolution kernel. C-level abort (SIGABRT) — not catchable via Python exception. Confirmed: openvino-int4-npu format cannot be compiled by VPUX on driver 32.0.100.4514 in heterogeneous speculative mode.

npu_viability_assessment.retry_rationale: LLVM ABORT is deterministic for this model/driver combination
npu_viability_assessment.note: Driver meets ADR-011 minimum but VPUX compiler cannot handle Qwen3-0.6B INT4 shape in speculative decoding context.

disposition_rationale: NPU draft device REJECTED. T-05 failed at model compilation stage with deterministic LLVM ABORT (VPUX as_convolution pass incompatibility). NPU cannot be used as speculative draft device for Qwen3-0.6B INT4 on driver 32.0.100.4514. GPU remains sole viable device for draft inference.
